<?php namespace Vonage\Subaccount; use Psr\Container\ContainerInterface; use Vonage\Client\APIResource; class ClientFactory { public function __invoke(ContainerInterface $container): Client { $api = $container->make(APIResource::class); $api->setIsHAL(true) ->setErrorsOn200(false) ->setBaseUrl('https://api.nexmo.com/accounts'); return new Client($api); } }
